metadata.name: zama_host
metadata.description: Solana PoC host program for Zama FHEVM ACL and compute events

docs: Anchor entrypoint module generated into the ZamaHost IDL.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Pays for the account's growth, if any.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Current allowed subject on the lineage.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Pays rent for the new account.

accounts.name: app_account_authority
docs: App account authority; must sign and match `app_account`.

accounts.name: host_config
docs: Singleton config PDA.

instructions.name: define_kms_context
docs: Defines a new KMS context (mirror of `ProtocolConfig.defineNewKmsContext`).

accounts.name: admin
docs: Configured host admin and rent payer for the context account.

accounts.name: host_config
docs: Singleton config PDA; its `current_kms_context_id` is advanced to `context_id`.

accounts.name: kms_context
docs: KMS context PDA created for `context_id`.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program used for account creation.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Pays rent if the delegation PDA must be created.

accounts.name: delegator
docs: User granting delegated decrypt rights.

accounts.name: host_config
docs: Singleton config PDA.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program used for account creation.

instructions.name: destroy_kms_context
docs: Destroys a non-current KMS context (mirror of `ProtocolConfig.destroyKmsContext`).

accounts.name: admin
docs: Configured host admin.

accounts.name: host_config
docs: Singleton config PDA holding the current active context id.

accounts.name: kms_context
docs: KMS context PDA being destroyed.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Pays rent for any durable output ACL records.

accounts.name: compute_subject
docs: Compute subject that must be allowed on durable encrypted inputs.

accounts.name: app_account_authority
docs: App account signer authorizing any durable output ACL metadata.

accounts.name: host_config
docs: Singleton config PDA. Read-only: the cap is read from here, but the writable per-slot
counter is the separate `hcu_block_meter`, never this singleton — so the hot path takes no
write lock on the config.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program used for durable output ACL creation.

accounts.name: hcu_authority
docs: The app identity the HCU block cap meters and trusts. Both HCU PDAs (`hcu_block_meter`,
`hcu_trusted_app_record`) are derived from this key — never from `payer` or
`app_account_authority`. A `Signer` so the identity is unforgeable: a program can only
sign its own PDAs via CPI seeds, so no caller can spend another app's meter or steal its
trusted bypass. Always required — even under the unrestricted default — so activating
the cap never changes the instruction's account shape.

accounts.name: hcu_block_meter
docs: Per-app HCU block meter (written once in the execution `charge`). Untrusted apps in the
metering band MUST supply it; trusted apps and the unrestricted default omit it. An
`UncheckedAccount` because it may be uninitialized (lazy-created) and is validated manually.

accounts.name: hcu_trusted_app_record
docs: Trust witness (read-only). Present + program-owned + `trusted == true` ⇒ bypass the cap;
absent (`None`) ⇒ untrusted, fall through to the meter; present-but-malformed ⇒ reject.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Pays rent for the config account.

types.name: AclSubjectEntry
docs: Pubkey stored inline as an allowed subject.

fields.name: pubkey
docs: Subject identity. For app users this is usually the owner pubkey; for
app programs this can be a program-controlled compute signer PDA.

types.name: CoprocessorInputAttestation
docs: A coprocessor input attestation carried inline by a [`FheEvalOperand::VerifiedInput`], re-verified
in-frame (no account, no PDA) — the instruction-local analog of EVM `allowTransient(input, contract)`.

fields.name: input_handle
docs: The verified input handle used as the operand.

fields.name: ct_handles
docs: All ciphertext handles covered by the proof.

fields.name: handle_index
docs: Index of `input_handle` within `ct_handles`.

fields.name: user_address
docs: Attested user identity (bytes32).

fields.name: contract_address
docs: Attested contract identity — the input's ACL domain key (bytes32).

fields.name: contract_chain_id
docs: Gateway-side contract chain id the attestation binds.

fields.name: extra_data
docs: Opaque extra data covered by the attestation.

fields.name: signatures
docs: Coprocessor EIP-712 signatures (65-byte secp256k1).

types.name: DenySubjectUpdatedEvent
docs: Emitted when a subject deny-list record is updated.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: deny_subject_record
docs: Canonical deny-list record PDA.

fields.name: subject
docs: Subject controlled by the deny-list record.

fields.name: denied
docs: Whether the subject is denied for grant-authority use.

fields.name: updated_slot
docs: Slot in which this update was applied.

types.name: EncryptedValueSubjectGrant
docs: One subject grant: identity to add to the allowed set.

types.name: FheBinaryOpCode
docs: Binary FHE operators currently modeled by the PoC.

types.name: FheBinaryOpEvent
docs: Emitted for a binary FHE operation accepted by the host.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: op
docs: Binary operator.

fields.name: subject
docs: Compute subject that passed ACL checks.

fields.name: lhs
docs: Left-hand operand handle.

fields.name: rhs
docs: Right-hand operand handle or scalar bytes.

fields.name: scalar
docs: Whether `rhs` is plaintext scalar bytes.

fields.name: result
docs: Output handle verified by the host formula.

types.name: FheEvalArgs
docs: Arguments for composed instruction-local FHE evaluation.

fields.name: context_id
docs: Caller-chosen domain separator for the instruction-local handles in this eval.
Callers should use a fresh value for each logical eval session.

fields.name: steps
docs: Ordered step list. Each `AllowedLocal` operand may only reference an output
produced by an earlier index in this vector.

types.name: FheEvalOperand
docs: Operand source for a composed FHE eval operation.

fields.name: handle
docs: Handle expected as the encrypted value's current handle.

fields.name: encrypted_value_index
docs: Index into `remaining_accounts` for the `EncryptedValue` account.

fields.name: producer_index
docs: Producer operation index.

fields.name: attestation
docs: The inline attestation re-verified to authorize this operand.

types.name: FheEvalOutput
docs: Output policy for a composed FHE eval operation.

fields.name: output_encrypted_value_index
docs: Index into `remaining_accounts` for the output `EncryptedValue` PDA.

fields.name: output_app_account_authority_index
docs: Optional index into `remaining_accounts` for the app account authority signer.
`None` uses the fixed `app_account_authority` account in the eval
context. `Some(index)` requires that remaining account to be a signer
and to match `output_app_account`.

fields.name: output_acl_domain_key
docs: ACL domain key for the output lineage.

fields.name: output_app_account
docs: App account authorized to bind the output lineage.

fields.name: output_encrypted_value_label
docs: Encrypted value label for the output lineage.

fields.name: output_subjects
docs: Subjects on the output lineage. On create these are the initial
subjects; on supersede they must equal the stored subjects exactly.

fields.name: previous_handle
docs: Superseded handle: `None` on create, `Some(current_handle)` on update.
Carried in instruction data so indexers can reconstruct the appended
MMR leaves without reading the account; validated against the account.

fields.name: previous_subjects
docs: Superseded subject set, parallel to `previous_handle` (`None` on create,
exact stored subjects on update). Same indexer-reconstruction purpose.

fields.name: make_public
docs: When true, the newly bound handle is born publicly decryptable: after
writing it as `current_handle`, a public-decrypt leaf is appended for
the new handle (byte-identical to `make_handle_public`). Carried in
instruction data so indexers reconstruct that leaf without reading the
account. This is the opt-in relaxation of the "created lineages cannot
be born public" invariant (DD-036).

types.name: FheEvalStep
docs: One step inside a composed FHE eval.

fields.name: op
docs: Binary operator.

fields.name: lhs
docs: Left-hand encrypted operand.

fields.name: rhs
docs: Right-hand encrypted operand or scalar bytes.

fields.name: output_fhe_type
docs: FHE type byte embedded in the output handle.

fields.name: output
docs: Whether this output remains instruction-local or is bound into durable ACL state.

fields.name: op
docs: Ternary operator.

fields.name: control
docs: Encrypted bool control operand.

fields.name: if_true
docs: Encrypted branch selected when control is true.

fields.name: if_false
docs: Encrypted branch selected when control is false.

fields.name: output_fhe_type
docs: FHE type byte embedded in the output handle.

fields.name: output
docs: Whether this output remains instruction-local or is bound into durable ACL state.

fields.name: plaintext
docs: Plaintext bytes encoded using the host scalar convention.

fields.name: fhe_type
docs: FHE type byte embedded in the output handle.

fields.name: output
docs: Whether this output remains instruction-local or is bound into durable ACL state.

fields.name: fhe_type
docs: FHE type byte embedded in the output handle.

fields.name: output
docs: Whether this output remains instruction-local or is bound into durable ACL state.

fields.name: op
docs: Unary operator.

fields.name: operand
docs: Encrypted operand.

fields.name: output_fhe_type
docs: FHE type byte embedded in the output handle.

fields.name: output
docs: Whether this output remains instruction-local or is bound into durable ACL state.

fields.name: upper_bound
docs: Exclusive upper bound encoded as a 256-bit big-endian integer.

fields.name: fhe_type
docs: FHE type byte embedded in the output handle.

fields.name: output
docs: Whether this output remains instruction-local or is bound into durable ACL state.

fields.name: operands
docs: Encrypted operands.

fields.name: fhe_type
docs: FHE type byte embedded in the output handle.

fields.name: output
docs: Whether this output remains instruction-local or is bound into durable ACL state.

fields.name: value
docs: Encrypted value to test.

fields.name: set
docs: Encrypted set operands.

fields.name: fhe_type
docs: FHE type byte of the value and set elements.

fields.name: output
docs: Whether this output remains instruction-local or is bound into durable ACL state.

fields.name: factor1
docs: Left-hand encrypted factor.

fields.name: factor2
docs: Right-hand factor, encrypted or scalar bytes.

fields.name: divisor
docs: Divisor encoded as a 256-bit big-endian integer.

fields.name: output_fhe_type
docs: FHE type byte embedded in the output handle.

fields.name: output
docs: Whether this output remains instruction-local or is bound into durable ACL state.

types.name: FheIsInEvent
docs: Emitted for an FHE is-in test accepted by the host.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: subject
docs: Compute subject that passed ACL checks.

fields.name: value
docs: Value handle being tested.

fields.name: set
docs: Set of handles to test against.

fields.name: fhe_type
docs: FHE type of value and set elements.

fields.name: result
docs: Output handle (always ebool) verified by the host formula.

types.name: FheMulDivEvent
docs: Emitted for an FHE multiply-divide operation accepted by the host.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: subject
docs: Compute subject that passed ACL checks.

fields.name: factor1
docs: First factor handle.

fields.name: factor2
docs: Second factor handle or scalar bytes.

fields.name: divisor
docs: Divisor plaintext scalar bytes.

fields.name: scalar
docs: Whether `factor2` is plaintext scalar bytes.

fields.name: result
docs: Output handle verified by the host formula.

types.name: FheRandBoundedEvent
docs: Emitted for bounded random ciphertext creation accepted by the host.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: subject
docs: Subject associated with the random handle.

fields.name: upper_bound
docs: Exclusive upper bound encoded as a 256-bit big-endian integer.

fields.name: seed
docs: Random seed carried to worker tests.

fields.name: fhe_type
docs: FHE type byte.

fields.name: result
docs: Output handle.

types.name: FheRandEvent
docs: Test-shim event for random ciphertext creation.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: subject
docs: Subject associated with the random handle.

fields.name: seed
docs: Random seed carried to worker tests.

fields.name: fhe_type
docs: FHE type byte.

fields.name: result
docs: Output handle.

types.name: FheSumEvent
docs: Emitted for an FHE sum operation accepted by the host.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: subject
docs: Compute subject that passed ACL checks.

fields.name: operands
docs: Input operand handles.

fields.name: fhe_type
docs: FHE type of all operands and the output.

fields.name: result
docs: Output handle verified by the host formula.

types.name: FheTernaryOpCode
docs: Ternary FHE operators currently modeled by the PoC.

types.name: FheTernaryOpEvent
docs: Emitted for a ternary FHE operation accepted by the host.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: op
docs: Ternary operator.

fields.name: subject
docs: Compute subject that passed ACL checks.

fields.name: control
docs: Encrypted control handle.

fields.name: if_true
docs: Handle selected when `control` is true.

fields.name: if_false
docs: Handle selected when `control` is false.

fields.name: result
docs: Output handle verified by the host formula.

types.name: FheUnaryOpCode
docs: Unary FHE operators.

types.name: FheUnaryOpEvent
docs: Emitted for a unary FHE operation accepted by the host.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: op
docs: Unary operator.

fields.name: subject
docs: Compute subject that passed ACL checks.

fields.name: operand
docs: Operand handle.

fields.name: result
docs: Output handle verified by the host formula.

types.name: HcuAppTrustUpdatedEvent
docs: Emitted when an app's HCU block-cap trust registry entry is updated.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: hcu_trusted_app_record
docs: Canonical trust-registry record PDA.

fields.name: app
docs: The app authority governed by the record.

fields.name: trusted
docs: Whether the app bypasses the per-app block cap.

fields.name: updated_slot
docs: Slot in which this update was applied.

types.name: HostConfig
docs: Singleton host configuration and authority surface.
`HostConfig` is the runtime switchboard for this PoC. Production-shaped
instructions reject while paused.

fields.name: admin
docs: Program administrator allowed to update config flags.

fields.name: chain_id
docs: Host-chain id included in handle derivation.

fields.name: input_verifier_authority
docs: Configured authority for input verification paths.

fields.name: gateway_chain_id
docs: EVM gateway chain id used in the coprocessor/KMS EIP-712 domain separators.

fields.name: input_verification_contract
docs: EVM `InputVerification` contract address: the EIP-712 verifying contract for
coprocessor `CiphertextVerification` input attestations.

fields.name: coprocessor_signer
docs: Authorized coprocessor EVM signer for input attestations (v0: single signer,
threshold 1).

fields.name: decryption_contract
docs: EVM `Decryption` contract address: the EIP-712 verifying contract for KMS
`PublicDecryptVerification` certificates (disclose/redeem).

fields.name: current_kms_context_id
docs: Active KMS context id (mirrors `ProtocolConfig.getCurrentKmsContextId`). The
signer set + thresholds live in the `KmsContext` PDA at this id; 0 means none
defined yet. Updated by `define_kms_context`.

fields.name: material_authority
docs: Configured authority for material-commitment paths.

fields.name: paused
docs: Pauses production-shaped host instructions when true.

fields.name: grant_deny_list_enabled
docs: Enables deny-list checks for persistent grant authorities.

fields.name: max_hcu_per_tx
docs: Max total HCU summed over one `fhe_eval` plan. `0` = unlimited (enforcement off).

fields.name: max_hcu_depth_per_tx
docs: Max critical-path (depth) HCU within one `fhe_eval` plan. `0` = unlimited.

fields.name: hcu_block_cap_per_app
docs: Per-app HCU budget per slot, enforced in `fhe_eval`. `u64::MAX` = unrestricted (the ship
default; short-circuits, touching no meter); `0` = ban untrusted apps (trusted still bypass);
any other value is the metering band (must be `>= max_hcu_per_tx` unless that is `0`).

fields.name: updated_slot
docs: Slot in which the config was initialized or last changed.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for `PDA("host-config")`.

types.name: HostConfigInitializedEvent
docs: Emitted when the singleton host config is initialized.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: config
docs: Host config PDA.

fields.name: admin
docs: Configured admin signer.

fields.name: chain_id
docs: Host-chain id used by handle derivation.

fields.name: input_verifier_authority
docs: Configured input verifier authority.

fields.name: material_authority
docs: Configured material commitment authority.

types.name: HostConfigUpdatedEvent
docs: Emitted when host config flags change.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: config
docs: Host config PDA.

fields.name: admin
docs: Admin signer that performed the update.

fields.name: paused
docs: Current pause state.

fields.name: grant_deny_list_enabled
docs: Current grant deny-list gate.

fields.name: max_hcu_per_tx
docs: Current max total HCU per `fhe_eval` plan (`0` = unlimited).

fields.name: max_hcu_depth_per_tx
docs: Current max critical-path HCU per `fhe_eval` plan (`0` = unlimited).

fields.name: hcu_block_cap_per_app
docs: Current per-app HCU block cap (`u64::MAX` = unrestricted, `0` = ban untrusted apps).

fields.name: updated_slot
docs: Slot in which this update was applied.

types.name: InitializeHostConfigArgs
docs: Initialization arguments for the singleton [`HostConfig`] account.

fields.name: chain_id
docs: Host-chain id encoded into newly derived handles.

fields.name: input_verifier_authority
docs: Authority used by signed encrypted-input bind paths.

fields.name: gateway_chain_id
docs: EVM gateway chain id used in the coprocessor/KMS EIP-712 domain separators.

fields.name: input_verification_contract
docs: EVM `InputVerification` contract address (EIP-712 verifying contract).

fields.name: coprocessor_signer
docs: Authorized coprocessor EVM signer for input attestations (v0: single signer).

fields.name: decryption_contract
docs: EVM `Decryption` contract address (EIP-712 verifying contract for KMS certs).

fields.name: material_authority
docs: Authority allowed to commit ciphertext material readiness.

fields.name: grant_deny_list_enabled
docs: Whether persistent grants must include a deny-list witness.

types.name: KmsContext
docs: A KMS context: the signer set + thresholds active under a `context_id`.

fields.name: context_id
docs: Monotonic context id (mirrors `kmsContextId`).

fields.name: signers
docs: KMS node signer EVM addresses authorized to sign certs in this context.

fields.name: thresholds
docs: Per-operation signature thresholds.

fields.name: destroyed
docs: True once destroyed (mirrors `destroyKmsContext`); destroyed contexts reject.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for `PDA("kms-context", context_id)`.

types.name: KmsContextDestroyedEvent
docs: Emitted when a KMS context is destroyed (mirrors `ProtocolConfig.KmsContextDestroyed`).

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: kms_context_id
docs: The destroyed context id.

types.name: KmsThresholds
docs: Per-operation signature thresholds for a KMS context (mirrors `KmsThresholds`).

fields.name: public_decryption
docs: Threshold for public-decrypt (disclose/redeem) certificates.

fields.name: user_decryption
docs: Threshold for user-decrypt certificates.

fields.name: kms_gen
docs: Threshold for key generation (KMS-internal; stored for fidelity).

fields.name: mpc
docs: Threshold for MPC (KMS-internal; stored for fidelity).

types.name: NewKmsContextEvent
docs: Emitted when a KMS context is defined (mirrors `ProtocolConfig.NewKmsContext`).

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: kms_context_id
docs: The new context id.

fields.name: signers
docs: KMS node signer EVM addresses authorized in this context.

fields.name: public_decryption_threshold
docs: Public-decrypt signature threshold.

fields.name: user_decryption_threshold
docs: User-decrypt signature threshold.

types.name: ProducedPublicOutput
docs: One public durable output produced by an `fhe_eval` frame.

fields.name: step_index
docs: Zero-based step index within the frame.

fields.name: encrypted_value
docs: Host-owned durable `EncryptedValue` account bound by the step.

fields.name: output_handle
docs: Block-entropy-derived output handle written to the account.

types.name: PublicOutputsProducedEvent
docs: Emitted once for the public outputs produced by an `fhe_eval` frame.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: outputs
docs: Produced public outputs in frame step order.

types.name: TrivialEncryptEvent
docs: Emitted for a trivial encryption accepted by the host.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: subject
docs: Subject associated with the created handle.

fields.name: plaintext
docs: Plaintext encoded into the handle.

fields.name: fhe_type
docs: FHE type byte embedded in the handle.

fields.name: result
docs: Output handle verified by the host formula.

types.name: UserDecryptionDelegation
docs: PoC user-decryption delegation witness.
Gateway/KMS payloads do not yet carry these records, but the account shape is
present so the final witness format has a concrete Solana state target.

fields.name: delegator
docs: User granting delegated decrypt rights.

fields.name: delegate
docs: Delegate allowed to request user decryption.

fields.name: app_account
docs: App context for the delegation.

fields.name: expiration_slot
docs: Slot after which the delegation is invalid.

fields.name: delegation_counter
docs: Monotonic counter incremented on every grant, regrant, and revoke.

fields.name: last_update_slot
docs: Slot in which this row was last updated.

fields.name: revoked
docs: Whether the delegation has been revoked by the delegator.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for this delegation account.

types.name: UserDecryptionDelegationUpdatedEvent
docs: Emitted when user-decryption delegation state changes.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: delegator
docs: User granting delegated decrypt rights.

fields.name: delegate
docs: Delegate allowed to request user decryption.

fields.name: app_account
docs: App context for the delegation.

fields.name: delegation_counter
docs: Monotonic counter after this update.

fields.name: old_expiration_slot
docs: Expiration slot before this update.

fields.name: new_expiration_slot
docs: Expiration slot after this update.

fields.name: last_update_slot
docs: Slot in which this update was applied.

fields.name: revoked
docs: Whether the delegation is revoked after this update.
